$comment: OpenCode registration for the Production Master thin client. packages/adapter-opencode ships a runnable dist/cli.js. OpenCode spawns it once as a persistent local MCP server and speaks newline-delimited JSON-RPC 2.0 (MCP: initialize, tools/list, tools/call) over its stdio — not the request/response CLI dispatch Claude Code's slash commands use. The `mcp` argument selects that mode; every tools/call is forwarded into the same runtime.update() the CLI's direct `update` subcommand uses, so mutation gating and session scoping are never duplicated. A user still runs `node packages/adapter-opencode/dist/cli.js login` once beforehand — login/investigate/connect stream a run and are not exposed as MCP tools. The thin client authenticates with device-code login and talks to the hosted service over HTTPS + SSE; set PM_SERVICE_URL (default https://api.productionmaster.ai). Secrets are ${ENV} references only, never literals.
